## Summary

Describe the requested improvement.

## Use Case

Explain how this would help users generate, validate or review synthetic outputs.

## Proposed Approach

If you have a preferred approach, describe it briefly.

Do not include real participant data, credentials, TRE outputs or other sensitive
information.
